hero.description: AI-powered academic translation that understands journal styles, paper structure, and your intent. Write in your language, publish in any.

problem.description: Non-native English speakers face systemic barriers in academic publishing. Up to 40% of research time is spent wrestling with language instead of advancing science.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From draft to submission in three steps.
howItWorks.step1Description: Write your paper in any language you think in. No mental translation required.
howItWorks.step2Description: AI translates and adapts to your target journal's style in real time, sentence by sentence.
howItWorks.step3Description: Edit in either language. Polish your manuscript and submit with confidence.

features.academicPrecisionDescription: Trained on academic conventions. Understands IMRAD structure, LaTeX markup, and journal-specific styling.
features.zeroCognitiveLoadDescription: Think in your language, publish in any. No more context-switching between writing and translating.
features.securityPrivacyDescription: Your research stays yours. Transparent API usage, no data retention, full cost visibility.
features.realtimeTranslationDescription: Edit source and translation side by side. Changes sync instantly with sentence-level precision.
features.journalStylingDescription: Choose from 8 academic journal styles. Your translation matches the target publication's conventions.
features.latexAwareDescription: Preserves \cite{}, \ref{}, equations, and all LaTeX commands intact. Your markup stays untouched.
features.structureCheckDescription: Automatic IMRAD structure validation. Catch missing sections before submission.
features.versionControlDescription: Save and restore versions of your translation. Never lose progress on a revision.
features.costTrackingDescription: See exactly what each translation costs in real time. No surprise bills.

cta.description: Great research happens everywhere. We believe the world's best ideas deserve an equal voice, regardless of the language they were born in.

login.tagline: Focus on the research. We handle the language.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that fits your research workflow.

dashboard.noDocumentsHint: Click "+ New Document" to start translating

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account and application settings

analytics.costTrendDescription: Estimated based on Gemini public pricing

welcome.title: Welcome to Unmute AI!
welcome.subtitle: Your research deserves to be heard worldwide. We're here to help you write with clarity and confidence.
welcome.feature3: Maintain your original voice and style
